r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: We need more vitamins, more supplements, more antioxidants—each addressing a specific deficiency or health concern.

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Replace your entire supplement routine with ONE superfood that delivers complete, bioavailable nutrition for cellular health, detoxification, and longevity

headline.verbatim_text: A Doctor's Shock Discovery: The Japanese superfood that could make vitamins, supplements—even your daily multivitamin—completely OBSOLETE

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Audience expects to ADD more supplements to their routine. A single food making ALL supplements obsolete violates the more-is-better supplement schema.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Complete nutrition from single source (vs. multi-supplement saturation)

lead.full_text: Dr. David Nelson couldn't understand it. He'd studied medicine at top American universities. He'd practiced for 15 years. Yet when he moved to Japan to study their healthcare system, he was stunned by what he found: Japanese people in their 70s and 80s who looked and moved like Americans in their 50s. Heart disease rates were a fraction of America's. Cancer rates were dramatically lower. Energy levels were off the charts. What was their secret? Dr. Nelson investigated everything—their diet, their lifestyle, their medical practices. And finally, he discovered it: A microscopic green algae that 80% of Japanese families consume daily, but that virtually NO Americans have ever heard of. This algae, called Chlorella, contains MORE nutrition than any other food on Earth. But here's the catch: Your body can't digest it. The cell wall is too tough. That is, until Japanese scientists discovered how to crack open the cell wall without destroying the nutrients inside...

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Opening with doctor's confusion/discovery violates the authority-has-all-answers schema. American doctor learning from Japanese culture inverts typical medical authority flow.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Western doctor humbled by Eastern wisdom, then bringing it back

primary_mechanism.name: Broken Cell Wall Chlorella
primary_mechanism.explanation: Chlorella contains the most concentrated nutrition on Earth—more protein than beef, more chlorophyll than any plant, 19 amino acids, vitamins, minerals. But its cell wall is made of indigestible cellulose—tougher than plant fiber. Sun Chlorella uses a patented DYNO-Mill process that cracks open 95% of cell walls through controlled pulverization, releasing nutrients while preserving their potency. Without this process, chlorella passes through your body undigested. WITH it, you absorb complete nutrition at the cellular level.

mechanism_proof.description: Dr. David Nelson - American physician studying Japanese healthcare
80% of Japanese families use chlorella daily; Japanese longevity statistics
Patented DYNO-Mill cell wall breaking process (95% broken vs 10-20% competitor products)

three_part_structure.what_they_think: We need more vitamins, more supplements, more antioxidants—each addressing a specific deficiency or health concern.
three_part_structure.what_real: Your body is nutrient-STARVED at the cellular level. Modern food is depleted. Supplements are synthetic and poorly absorbed. You need COMPLETE, BIOAVAILABLE whole-food nutrition that your cells actually recognize and can use.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Synthetic vitamins are chemical isolates your body doesn't fully recognize. Chlorella supplements with intact cell walls pass through undigested—you're literally flushing money down the toilet. Only broken cell wall chlorella delivers the nutrition your cells are screaming for.

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: You weren't choosing the wrong supplements. Your body was rejecting synthetic vitamins and couldn't digest regular chlorella. The bioavailability problem was invisible to you.
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Connects: expensive supplement routines + minimal results + persistent fatigue + declining health despite 'doing everything right' + Japanese longevity advantage → all explained by bioavailability gap
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Not someone with multiple deficiencies requiring multiple supplements, but someone who needs ONE complete, bioavailable food source

promise_architecture.primary_promise: Replace your entire supplement routine with ONE superfood that delivers complete, bioavailable nutrition for cellular health, detoxification, and longevity
promise_architecture.timeframe: 30 days for noticeable energy/clarity, 90 days for comprehensive transformation
promise_architecture.specificity: Complete nutrition, heavy metal detox, immune boost, sustained energy, mental clarity

tier_1_proof.description: Japanese longevity and disease rates vs. American; 80% household penetration
Dr. David Nelson - American doctor's cross-cultural discovery

tier_2_proof.description: Patented DYNO-Mill process breaks 95% of cell walls vs 10-20% competitors
19 amino acids, complete protein, highest chlorophyll concentration on Earth

metadata.big_idea: Japanese superfood with broken cell wall delivers complete nutrition and detoxification that Westerners are missing

fssit_candidates.statement: The supplement industry has been lying to you. They sell you expensive bottles of synthetic vitamins your body barely recognizes. But chlorella? Your cells KNOW this food. Your DNA has been programmed for millions of years to absorb whole-food nutrition—not chemical isolates created in a lab.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why expensive supplement routines produce minimal results, why you pee out bright yellow vitamins, why synthetic feels different from food-based nutrition.

fssit_candidates.statement: Dr. Nelson discovered the uncomfortable truth: Japanese people aren't healthier because of better genetics or luck. They're healthier because they consume something Americans don't—and because American supplement companies have been selling us BROKEN chlorella that passes through undigested.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains the Japanese longevity advantage, why other chlorella products failed, why this specific version matters. Names the quality gap.

fssit_candidates.statement: Your body doesn't have separate deficiencies requiring separate supplements. You have ONE problem: cellular starvation. And chlorella solves it with ONE solution: complete, bioavailable whole-food nutrition.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Completely reframes supplement strategy from 'more is better' to 'completeness and bioavailability.' Simplifies the overwhelming supplement landscape.

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Distributed throughout—in lead (Japanese mystery), mechanism (bioavailability revelation), root cause (cellular starvation), and close (simplification)

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: Post-2000s Japanese health trend, clean food movement, supplement skepticism growing
temporal_analysis.temporal_urgency_device: Daily cellular deterioration, toxin accumulation, declining food quality
